narrative_beat: O pergaminho profético se abre e dentro dele pulsa código digital vivo — a profecia não era metáfora, era instruções técnicas

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: straight-on, slight top angle looking down at 10 degrees
shot.depth_of_field: scroll center in focus, curling edges and background soft

subject.primary: ancient parchment scroll unrolling horizontally, outer surface aged brown vellum with visible handwritten text, inner surface revealing living digital code in glowing gold as it opens
subject.focal_point: the transition zone where ancient parchment exterior reveals the glowing digital interior
subject.secondary: living golden code shimmering and shifting on the interior pages as if breathing
props: aged exterior vellum with crackling texture
glowing golden digital code on interior pages
partially unrolled scroll revealing the contrast
floating orange embers near the glowing digital portion

environment.location: technology laboratory with monitors and equipment
environment.atmosphere: revelation of hidden truth — ancient container holding modern content

composition.rule: horizontal center — scroll unrolling along horizontal axis, Ken Burns slow pan from left ancient edge to right digital interior
composition.foreground: scroll in gold and aged brown, transition zone prominent at center
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white technology lab — multiple monitors, circuit boards, laboratory equipment on benches

lighting.key_light: golden glow from the digital interior pages, illuminating the opening scroll from within
lighting.fill_light: cold laboratory light from above touching the exterior aged vellum surface
lighting.rim_light: crimson edge glow tracing the curled edges of the scroll where it's most tightly rolled
lighting.mood: revelation, the shock of finding modern technology encoded in ancient prophecy

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: wonder and dread — what if the prophets were describing source code they couldn't understand

symbolism.primary: the ancient scroll containing digital code represents prophecy as literal technical specification
symbolism.secondary: the transition from aged vellum to living digital interior shows the continuity between ancient and modern revelation

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
